notes: Multi-step login flow. First screen: email/phone input with Next button. Second screen: password input. Possible 2FA interstitial. Google-specific Material Design components. DOM structure changes between steps — not a traditional single-page form.

endpoints.label: Identifier Step — Email/Phone
endpoints.description: Email or phone input field with Next button on the first step of sign-in

endpoints.label: Password Step
endpoints.description: Password input field with Next button on the second step of sign-in

endpoints.label: Forgot Email
endpoints.description: Link to find/recover Google account email address

endpoints.label: Forgot Password
endpoints.description: Link to account recovery for forgotten password (shown on password step)

endpoints.label: Create Account
endpoints.description: Link to Google account registration with options for personal, child, or business account

endpoints.label: Language Selector
endpoints.description: Dropdown to change the page display language
